title: ProBall Analytics
description: A baseball analytics web app using HTML, JSON APIs, and JavaScript for CPBL data visualization.

title: Automated Customer Service System (WIP)
description: This project is a voice chat prototype built on the OpenAI Realtime API using WebRTC. It captures microphone audio, sends the SDP offer to the backend, and connects to OpenAI for real-time speech-to-speech interaction.

title: JLPT Learning Game (WIP)
description: Personal project creating a JLPT learning game using Unity and C# for interactive language learning.

title: Reciept & Financial Management System (WIP)
description: A bill splitting app with a financial dashboard by using tesseract OCR for receipt scanning and React for the frontend.

title: English Teaching Platform
description: School project integrating Object-Oriented Programming and database synchronization.
